creator: vaferpotato
ingredients_text: Shrimp 90% (shrimp, table salt), garlic-chili marinade 10% (rapeseed oil, maltodextrin, table salt, sugar, garlic 0.6%, starch, spices (contains celery), paprika, extra virgin olive oil, paprika spice extract, chili 0.1%). May contain traces of sulphites.
ingredients_text_de: Garnelen 90% (Garnelen, Speisesalz), Knoblauch-Chili-Marinade 10% (Rapsöl, Maltodextrin, Speisesalz, Zucker, Knoblauch 0,6%, Stärke, Gewürze (enthält Sellerie), Paprika, natives Olivenöl extra, Paprikagewürzextrakt, Chili 0,1%). Kann Spuren von Sulphiten enthalten.
